name: Real Estate Sector Weekly Google Trends Home Buying Surge

trigger.description: Combined weekly search interest for 'house for sale' and 'mortgage rates' rises more than 15% week-over-week

entry_exit.entry: If weekly combined search interest for 'house for sale' and 'mortgage rates' rises more than 15% week-over-week
entry_exit.exit: After 4 weeks or when combined search interest normalizes
